paper_title: Big line or big convex polygon
summary: The paper establishes $(3\ell-1)\cdot 2^{n-5} < ES_{\ell}(n) < \ell^{2}\cdot 2^{n+C\sqrt{n\log n}}$, leaving a gap between the linear lower bound and the quadratic upper bound in $\ell$. No follow-up paper resolving the correct joint dependence on $\ell$ was found in the indexed literature. The paper appeared in Computational Geometry, vol. 131 (2026).
search_queries: ES_ell(n) Erdos-Szekeres collinear convex "big line" "big convex polygon" 2405.03455
Conlon Fox He Mubayi Suk Verstraete "big line or big convex polygon" ES dependence ell follow-up
arxiv "ES_ell" OR "ES_l(n)" collinear convex polygon dependence ell linear quadratic 2025 2026
notes: No follow-up paper resolving the ell-dependence question was found after three targeted searches and two fetches. The related paper arXiv:2409.03122 (Furukawa, 'Happy ending or many concurrent lines') studies a dual line-version of the problem and does not address the point-version open problem. The paper itself was published in Computational Geometry, vol. 131 (2026), article 102218, without revision of the open problem.
